doc_html:
CHAPTER 30-A. IDENTIFICATION OF HEARING

LOSS IN INFANTS LAW

§2261. Short title

            This Chapter may be cited as the "Identification of Hearing Loss in Infants Law".

            Acts 1992, No. 417, §1; Acts 2017, No. 146, §11.
